input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.1.1
            TITLE: the shutdown circuit consists of the following components, connected in series:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.1.1: The Shutdown Circuit consists of the following components, connected in series:
EV.7.1.1 The Shutdown Circuit consists of the following components, connected in series: 
a. Accumulator Management System (AMS)  EV.7.3 
b. Insulation Monitoring Device (IMD)  EV.7.6
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 101 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
c. Brake System Plausibility Device (BSPD)  EV.7.7 
d. Interlocks (as required)  EV.7.8 
e. Master Switches (GLVMS, TSMS)  EV.7.9 
f. Shutdown Buttons  EV.7.10 
g. Brake Over Travel Switch (BOTS)  T.3.3 
h. Inertia Switch  T.9.4

final_answer: The Shutdown Circuit consists of the following components, connected in series: a. Accumulator Management System (AMS) EV.7.3 b. Insulation Monitoring Device (IMD) EV.7.6 c. Brake System Plausibility Device (BSPD) EV.7.7 d. Interlocks (as required) EV.7.8 e. Master Switches (GLVMS, TSMS) EV.7.9 f. Shutdown Buttons EV.7.10 g. Brake Over Travel Switch (BOTS) T.3.3 h. Inertia Switch T.9.4
